_comment_env: Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your OS env before launching Claude Code. Azure auth happens via `az login --service-principal` using the medisync-admin SP; see docs/runbooks/02-azure-rbac.md. Do NOT put secrets in this file — it is committed to git.

mcpServers._comment_pending_azure_mcp: Microsoft's Azure MCP server (github.com/Azure/azure-mcp) is in preview as of 2026-05. Wiring deferred until it stabilizes. Until then, the agent uses `az` CLI directly via approved Bash permissions below.

github._comment: Official GitHub MCP. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN env var, fine-grained PAT scoped to the MediSync repo only.

context7._comment: Live docs lookup for Azure SDK, Functions, Pydantic, Terraform azurerm. Prevents hallucinated APIs.
